TextENGNew: ...And so, by the time we reached the shrine... ahh, one has to appreciate a good cliché.
The exact scene of havoc everyone had been expecting had materialised before us.
``Oh my, as expected of you, Jirou-san. Popular with the young girls, are we? When on earth did you become such a celebrity, hmm?``
changeReason: Old translates 若い子 as 'children' which is misleading in this flirtatious context; new correctly renders it as 'young girls'.

TextENGNew: ``N-no, n-no, no, no — you've got it all wrong! This has to be some sort of misunderstanding...! Oof! Rena-chan, please don't cling to me so tightly...!``
``Heeeeey, Tomitake-san☆ Won't you teach Rena about cameras and all sorts of things? Won't you?``
``Well, I mean, ahahahaha, the path of the camera is long and demanding, but there's nothing more rewarding! I'm glad you're showing an interest, Rena-chan... Haha, hahahaha, haha...``
``Oh, well, don't mind me at all. After all, Jirou-san is such a wonderfully kind and experienced photographer. He'd kindly teach any girl who asked — not just me — isn't that right?``
``That kind, gentle side of you, Tomitake-san... Rena loves it... Won't you teach Rena... about cameras... and about other things too... Many other things...``
``Wh-what other things?! Haha, hahahahahaha...``
``Jirou-san, you'll teach her things nobody even asked about, won't you? You can be so very... forceful at times like these.``
``Wh-wh-what is he forceful about, I wonder... I wonder! ...But... Rena... if it's Tomitake-san... whatever he might teach her... would be... fine... Probably fine.``
``Nyeaaaaaohhhhhh, oh ho ho ho ho hahahahaha...!``
...Tomitake-san's unnerving laugh echoed out across the shrine grounds.

Perhaps an ordinary young man who had never experienced a girl's attention would react this way. ...I was no different, so I had better keep myself in check. ...Not that the opportunity was likely to arise.
At any rate, it might have been poor form toward the two of them, but from where we were watching it was an enormously entertaining spectacle.
``R-Renaaaa!! Come to your senses!! What you're feeling isn't real!!``
``It's — not real? How cruel! These are Rena's true feelings!``
``Rena has noticed, you see... how truly kind Tomitake-san is! It might be a small thing, but now that she's noticed, she can never forget it...!!``
``And Rena is surely the only one who could ever appreciate his kindness!! So Tomitake-san is the only one for Rena now!``
``...Ah... haaaahhhhh...``

His brain was presumably flooding with every pleasurable chemical at its disposal. Tomitake-san stood there in a blissful daze, a thin trail of drool hanging from his lip. ...Takano's expression made for a sharp contrast — and that contrast was immensely entertaining.
``Tomitake-san!! You can't forget about Takano-san! Are you going to abandon your own partner?!``
``Th-that's right...! S-sorry, Rena-chan, but I already have Takano-san!! S-so, well, I...!``
``Hmm...? What exactly do you mean by 'partner'? I'm not familiar with that sort of loanword. Could you be a little clearer? Unless you tell me exactly what you mean, I simply can't understand.``
changeReason: Old omits Takano's claim about not understanding loanwords (横文字よくわかんない); new includes this detail which is part of her teasing strategy to force Tomitake to say it plainly.

TextENGNew: ``No, I mean, well, um, errr... ahahahahaha!``
``Let Rena explain! Takano-san is Tomitake-san's friend!``
``His... his friend...?!``
``Ho, ho ho ho ho ho! Rena-chan, you're too young to understand grown-up relationships, aren't you?``
``I understand perfectly!!``
``Come on, Tomitake-san~ Rena wants to photograph wild birds with you... and if you like, she could even dress up as a nurse and model for you...``
``Whaaaaaat?! R-Really?!``
``No, wait — we can't, I already have Takano-san!!``
``You'd rather have someone who, no matter how many times you've asked her to pose in her nurse uniform, has never once said yes?``
``H-how rude...! Jirou-san would never say anything of the sort.``
``That's a lie!!!``
``Rena understands everything about Tomitake-san!! You say you're photographing birds, but your eyes always wander — always drifting toward Takano-san!``
``Rena knows. You don't want to photograph birds at all. You want to photograph her!``
``But all Takano-san ever does is drop hints and never lets you! That makes her a failure as a partner!``
``So Rena will take the position of your partner home with heeeeer~!!``
``Rena would model for you, Tomitake-san! Come on, Tomitake-san~ For the nurse uniform... white, or light blue, or pink... which would you prefer... prefer?``
``Huh... hu... huoooowaaAAAAaahhh!! Chwoo-chwoo-pffff, HWOOOOOOOO!!``
It seemed Tomitake-san's CPU had finally succumbed to thermal overload.
Steam erupted from both ears and both nostrils — much like a locomotive, which was rather fitting for the sounds he was making — and then he fainted.

``I don't care any more!! Fine, Jirou-san can go on and kindly and thoroughly teach Rena-chan everything she wants to know! I don't care, I don't care, I don't care! This is insufferable, utterly insufferable!!``
changeReason: Old translates 失礼しちゃう as 'I'm leaving' when it actually means 'this is insufferable/outrageous', changing Takano's expression from departure to indignation.

TextENGNew: ``Ahh, we couldn't stop them from breaking up...! Satoko, Rika-chan — are you ready yet?!``
``...Mii! Ready!!``
``I'm launching it!!``
Aside from the mountain forest behind Hinamizawa, these shrine grounds were the location where Satoko had set the greatest concentration of traps!
She recalibrated all of them and took aim at Rena!!
``Now — fire!!!``
Rocket-like projectiles came flying at Rena from every direction!
Modified bottle rockets — a perilous contraption that no sensible child should ever attempt to reproduce!!
``This... this is hardly in the category of a trap any more. This is more like a battleship barrage...``
``S-so?! Did it work?!``
``...I rather doubt an attack of that calibre would slow Rena down while she's in this state...``
``But she's coughing!! Keiichi-san — take Tomitake-san away while you have the chance!!``
``Less 'take away', more 'drag away'!!``
``Hauuuu, why are you all so cruel?! Achoo, achoo, ACHOO!!``
``Ohhh ho ho ho ho!! Bottle rocket spice mix — extra pepper edition! Please enjoy your stay in a sneezing hell!!``
``Hah — I'm caught in it too! Achoo, achoo!!``
``Anyway, let's get behind the assembly hall for now!! And while we're there — search Tomitake-san! Find the magatama!!``
``...He's frothing at the mouth with a perfectly blissful expression. But when he comes round, things will no doubt be dreadful for him. Let's give him headpats while we have the chance. Mii~!``
We dragged Tomitake-san behind the assembly hall.
Rena was still trapped in her ferocious sneezing, but that would only hold her for so long. She'd be over here any moment.
And worse — the assault had probably made her register us as 'enemies obstructing the path of her love', so she'd come at us without mercy and without warning...!
``Come on, pat him down! Get into his pockets!!``
``Small coins, crumpled receipts... A rather undignified collection of belongings!``
``...Strange, I can't find it. He does have it, doesn't he?``
``...Rikaaa, you help too! We have to find it before Rena-san gets here!``
``M-mii... of course I want to search, but... the detector isn't pointing toward Tomitake!``
``What?! If the detector isn't pointing at him, doesn't that mean he doesn't have it?! Then why was Rena-san after Tomitake-san?! He no longer has the magatama?!``

``...Mii! According to the ancient texts, the Magatama of Fuwarazu stimulates the brain's love receptors and causes it to secrete the same chemicals as during genuine romantic feelings. This produces a simulated state of love... mii!``
``What this means is — even after Tomitake let go of it, the effects would have continued for a short while...!``
``Ahhh, come on — we're far too busy for this seemingly-plausible rambling!!``
...And what sort of ancient texts contain terms like 'love receptors' anyway~?
``In other words... Tomitake-san had it until just recently, but no longer has it right now, is that what you're saying?!``
``What do you mean?! And what about Rena — what will happen to her?``
``Ahhh!! She's gone — nowhere to be seen!! She must have gone looking for whoever has the magatama now!!``
``Th-that's not good! If we lose sight of Rena, we'll have no way of knowing who she's pursuing!``
``...Then it would be quicker to wake up this blissful fool and ask him!``
``...Leave that to me.``
Rika-chan found a conveniently placed outdoor tap, turned it on, and pointed the hose directly at Tomitake-san's face.
...Rika-chan shows no mercy. ...Is she a little irritated?
``Uwah!! A-ow... wait — was it a dream? Was all that a dream...?!``
``Haha, Rena-chan offering to dress up as a nurse for a private photoshoot... Haha, I knew it was too good to be true. And breaking up with Takano-san over it... Hahahaha... What a terrible dream.``
``Ah, ahahahaha! G-good thing it was only a dream! Anyway — Tomitake-san! You picked up a white magatama yesterday, didn't you?!``
``Huh... what? I don't know anything about any magatama. But I did find a white fur seal keyring. At the dam site, yesterday, when I ran into Keiichi-kun.``
``That's the one! What did you do with it?!``

``Ah, right. I gave it to Takano-san as a present, just a little while ago. She complained about me picking up something off the ground, but she accepted it anyway! She can be charmingly contrary like that — tahahaha...``
``Then it's Takano-san!! Which way did she go just now?!``
``That direction, I think — toward the stream! And we're in trouble — Rena's already heading there!!``
``A-apparently it doesn't matter that she's a woman...! What a terrifying effect...!!``
``...I, too, was rather taken aback by this particular pairing.``
Though I could always find amusement in others' misfortunes, she was a club member — we couldn't leave her to this.
We ran off toward the stream.
